## LibraryData.ISubLibraryAsyncLoadResult.protectedCollections property

Protected collections that were captured but not decrypted. These can be decrypted later using `loadProtectedCollectionAsync`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly protectedCollections: ReadonlyArray<IProtectedCollectionInternal<SourceId>>;
```
